name: otel-preload
description: OTel bootstrap deps for the backend image, installed OUTSIDE the Nitro bundle (loaded via NODE_OPTIONS=--import ./otel.instrument.mjs). EXACT versions, kept equal to the resolved @opentelemetry/* versions the root pnpm-lock.yaml tests against — so the image ships exactly what CI validated (no caret float, reproducible layer). See docs/OBSERVABILITY.md (#78).
